_meta.description: Charge atomic group update with all four v1 members. Represents the target wire shape after DV-03/DV-04 wiring ships. chargeState is non-null; timeToFull is null (expected when chargeState is Disconnected — not charging). See vehicle_update.charge_partial.json for the transitional form where both are null, and edge-cases/snapshot.charging.json for a scenario with non-null timeToFull.
